programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: Justin and Ashley's plans to sell their home in Auburn, Washington are thrown into chaos when the property is overrun by intruders. When Flash and his team arrive to remove the squatters, what should be a routine civil matter quickly turns criminal, as police descend on the property upending the entire operation.

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: When a stranger moves in and takes over the new home of Nabih and Kadeisha, Flash and his team are deployed to Dearborn, Michigan with one goal: out squat the squatter. But what starts as a straightforward job becomes a battle of endurance when the trespasser challenges Flash to see who can hold their ground the longest.

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: Flash Shelton and his team head to Vancouver, Washington to help a homeowner after a house sitter overstays her welcome and becomes an unwanted squatter; when Flash's team attempts to reclaim the home by using surveillance cameras, megaphones and even snakes, the confrontation turns into a tense standoff.

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: In Cle Elum, Washington, Casey lost her dream home to a stranger who claimed it as her own for over 4 months and even tried to rent rooms out to other people for profit; but when Flash and his team move in, will their tactics be enough for this squatter to finally leave once and for all?

programme.desc: Marilyn Monroe was 1950s Hollywood's brightest star. But beneath Tinseltown's glitz was an industry shaped by the mob. Did Marilyn pay dearly in a brutal game of power and betrayal.

programme.title: Marilyn and the Mob
programme.desc: In 1962 Marilyn Monroe travels to Nevada with Frank Sinatra, placing her amid mobsters and dangerous rumours. Days later, she's found dead. Was her death just an accident.

programme.title: In the Footsteps of Killers
programme.desc: In 1993, a Lambeth Council employee was beaten to death in his Clapham home. Was it personal or were dark forces at his workplace involved.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Award-winning chef Paul runs Italian joint Bazzini in New Jersey, but didn't realise how difficult running a restaurant would be. Can Gordon turn it around.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: Francois's hot-air balloon goes out of control before the Pup Pup Boogie Contest. The Pups, with Liberty, must race to the rescue.

programme.title: Move It Milkshakers!
programme.desc: Kemi and Derek 'Move It' as they introduce the letter M, exploring amazing things that begin with M, helping little ones to discover letters and sounds, before going Marching.

programme.title: Rubble & Crew
programme.desc: ...Skydiving Center. Mayor Greatway and Mr Ducky-Doo want to show their skydiving skills. But when wind gets in the way, the pups help them sky dive on the ground.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and her family enjoy the apple tree at the top of the hill. It has a swing on it that they all like to swing on and Peppa has a special song for it.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: There isn't long to go before the big day! Peppa takes the role as Daddy's coach and, with George, devises lots of fun games to help Daddy.

programme.title: Tim Rex in Space
programme.desc: Tim and Tommy go on a camping trip but soon disagree on what to do first.

programme.title: Stan & Gran
programme.desc: Stan keeps hearing the tune of an ice cream van but it's not there! Seals are singing, whistles are blowing and birds are barking! What's going on.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: When a baby caribou follows a playful snowshoe rabbit, it winds up speeding down a mountainside. It's up to the PAW Patrol to save the caribou calf and reunite him with his family.

programme.title: The Adventures of Paddington
programme.desc: Paddington is on a mission to become a knight - he just needs to complete three heroic quests in a day.

programme.title: Ben and Holly's Little Kingdom

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and her family visit Uncle Pig, Aunty Pig and Cousin Chloe. Chloe has a new puppet theatre.

programme.title: Odo

programme.title: Culture Kitchen

programme.desc: This busy couple wants the family room revamped for friends and family. Jake makes a custom table, while Jazz adds art, throw pillows and a new light fixture. The reveal meal is pasta with crab sauce & snicker doodle cupcakes.
